Trigger Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the Dental Care CA was triggered. -=Not assessed/no information
0=Not checked (No)
1=Checked (Yes)
593 V0200A15B_DNTL_CPL_CD V0200A15B_DNTL_CPL_CD V0200A15B Dental Addressed in Care Plan Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the Dental Care care area was addressed in the care plan. -=Not assessed/no information
0=Not checked (No)
1=Checked (Yes)
